title: Hegseth, Italian Counterpart Meet at Pentagon
description: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth hosted Italy's Defense Minister Guido Crosetto during a bilateral engagement at the Pentagon.

body.text: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth hosted Italy's Defense Minister Guido Crosetto during a bilateral engagement today at the Pentagon.
Secretary of War Pete Hegseth greets Italy's Defense Minister Guido Crosetto at the Pentagon, June 15, 2026.
